name: AM-18
description: Semi-automatic precision pistol with 33-round magazine and 1,100-1,200 rounds per minute fire rate.

name: AR M4 MK18
description: A pinnacle of tactical excellence, featuring a 10.3" barrel, CNC-machined 7075-T6 aluminum receiver, and RIS II picatinny quad rail. Built for precision and durability.

name: SPAS-12
description: A versatile combat shotgun known for its dual semi-automatic and pump-action modes, featuring a folding stock and heat shield.

name: H&K MP5
description: A legendary 9mm submachine gun renowned for its reliability and precision. Features a distinctive thin magazine and operates with a roller-delayed blowback mechanism.

name: Barrett M82
description: A .50 BMG semi-automatic sniper rifle known for its precision and long-range capabilities.

name: Sawed-Off Shotgun
description: A compact double-barrel shotgun with shortened barrel and stock, perfect for close-quarters combat. Devastating spread at short range and easy concealment, ideal for urban encounters.

name: M32A1 MSGL
description: A semi-automatic 40mm grenade launcher with a 6-round cylinder, capable of firing all rounds in 3 seconds. Effective range up to 250m with Medium Velocity rounds, 800m maximum.

name: M-9 Bayonet
description: A versatile 12-inch multi-purpose tool featuring a durable stainless steel blade with a saw-toothed edge.

name: Stoner 96
description: A state-of-the-art light machine gun featuring an open-bolt, constant recoil action for enhanced control and accuracy.

name: AK74M
description: Utilizing the 5.45x39mm cartridge, offers superior accuracy and reduced recoil compared to its predecessor, the AK-47.

name: SRS99G-S6 AM
description: A pinnacle of precision and lethality in sniper rifles featuring modular design, 14.5mm ammunition capacity, kinetic suppression technology, and both precision and automatic firing modes.

name: Colt M1911
description: A .45 caliber semi-automatic pistol with a 7-round detachable magazine. Features fixed front and rear sights, a spur hammer, and dual safeties. Designed for reliability and precision in close-quarters combat.

name: UMP 45
description: A lightweight, blowback-operated submachine gun with a cyclic rate of 600-750 rounds per minute. Chambered in 9x19mm, .40 S&W, or .45 ACP, featuring a side-folding stock, Picatinny rails, and select-fire options.
